Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x081F "KLAX-081F" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Klax.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the JSR $7074 instruction at $7047 to be JSR $0400 instead. 2. Added a small routine at $0400 to set $7A to $01 so that the game defaults to joystick. The routine then JSRs to $7074 and then returns to carry on the normal code flow. 3. Changed the two CMP #$FF instructions at $6DB6 and $6DC8 to CMP #$EF instead, which is used to compare the value in $D012. This fixes a potential hang as the raster IRQ was also set to fire on line #$FF, meaning that sometimes it would fire first and cause the busy waits to loop forever.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
